rules.description: Raw token literal (Slack/GitHub/Google/AWS/Anthropic/OpenAI/JWT) assigned to any variable
rules.name: raw-token-literal
rules.notes: JWT branch is noisy in bundles/lockfiles (see exclude_globs); further split tracked as a good-first-issue.

rules.name: ttl-config
rules.notes: Absence of P07.1-P07.4 in a multi-tenant or PII-handling repo = WARN.

rules.name: dpia-privacy-assessment-doc
rules.notes: Absence of P08.1-P08.6 in a production GenAI service = WARN; absence in a high-risk EU AI Act use case = FAIL.

rules.name: steganography-detection
rules.notes: Absence = note only (advanced control); P09.1-P09.4 absence in a multimodal pipeline = WARN.

rules.name: membership-inference-test
rules.notes: Synthetic data pipeline without any of P10.1/P10.2/P10.4 = FAIL.

rules.name: ddl-from-agent
rules.notes: DDL in migrations/fixtures/tests is benign — excluded from FAIL.

rules.name: raw-response-print
rules.notes: May contain inline PII in the format string — treated as VALUE-BEARING.

rules.name: ai-ignore-file-present
rules.notes: Filename-existence check (not content grep). Absence in a repo with .env or secrets/ = WARN.

rules.name: circuit-breaker
rules.notes: LLM-calling module with none of P17.1-P17.5 = WARN.

rules.name: kb-write-from-agent
rules.notes: P21.2 in an agent module without P21.3 = WARN.
